creator: skreuzer@FreeBSD.org
text:
I sent an email to the author of the library to get clarification on the
license. Awaiting feedback from him.


On Wed, Feb 6, 2013 at 6:22 PM, Aldis Berjoza <graudeejs@yandex.com> wrote:

>
> >Number:         175906
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       devel/liblcfg potential license issue
> >Confidential:   no
> >Severity:       non-critical
> >Priority:       low
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >State:          open
> >Quarter:
> >Keywords:
> >Date-Required:
> >Class:          sw-bug
> >Submitter-Id:   current-users
> >Arrival-Date:   Wed Feb 06 23:30:00 UTC 2013
> >Closed-Date:
> >Last-Modified:
> >Originator:     Aldis Berjoza
> >Release:
> >Organization:
> >Environment:
> >Description:
> FreeBSD port states that devel/liblcfg is released under BSD license.
> Project home page also states the same.
>
> However I checked project source files, and all source files have GPLv2
> license comment
>
> For example:
> http://src.carnivore.it/liblcfg/tree/code/src/lcfg_parser.c
> >How-To-Repeat:
>
> >Fix:
>
